Sora 2 文生视频
LLMs

OpenAI Sora 2 文生视频模型，支持 720p 分辨率，可生成带音频的高质量视频

video

fal-ai/sora-2/text-to-video
Pricing

160 积分/Done
按视频时长计费
Price Factors:
duration (视频时长)

时长 4
160 points
时长 8
320 points
时长 12
480 points

prompt*

Advanced (4)
Execute

Example Output Preview
Reference
Click "Execute" to try with pre-filled parameters
Examples
好莱坞分手场景
INPUT PARAMETERS
{
  "prompt": "A dramatic Hollywood breakup scene at dusk on a quiet suburban street. A man and a woman in their 30s face each other, speaking softly but emotionally, lips syncing to breakup dialogue. Cinematic lighting, warm sunset tones, shallow depth of field."
}

Seedance 1.5 Pro 文生视频
LLMs

字节跳动 Seedance 1.5 Pro 文生视频模型，支持同步生成视频和音频（对话、音效、背景音乐）。原生音频生成，无需后期配音。支持 480p/720p/1080p 分辨率，4-12 秒时长

video
Model ID:
fal-ai/bytedance/seedance/v1.5/pro/text-to-video
Pricing

105 积分/Done
按时长计费：480p: 10积分/s / 720p: 21积分/s / 1080p: 47积分/s
Price Factors:
duration (视频时长)
resolution (分辨率)
Price Examples:
2秒 480p
20 points
3秒 480p
30 points
2秒 720p
42 points

Flux 2 Flash
LLMs

Black Forest Labs FLUX.2 图像生成和编辑模型。增强写实感、更清晰的文字渲染、原生编辑能力。无图片时为文生图，提供图片时自动切换为图像编辑模式

image

fal-ai/flux-2/flash

2 积分/Done

蚂蚁大战
INPUT PARAMETERS
{
  "prompt": "An army of ants battles for a sugar cube in a giant sandbox, with tiny plastic soldier toys caught in the melee. Ant bodies shine against gritty beige sand and the glossy, crystalline cube. Fiery sunrise spills golden highlights, throwing dramatic shadows, amplifying the excitement."
}

Nano Banana Pro
LLMs

Google 最新的高质量图像生成和编辑模型（又名 Nano Banana 2），支持写实风格和文字渲染。无图片时为文生图，提供图片时自动切换为图像编辑模式

num_images (生成数量)
